title: Spec / audience
description: Target audiences for the site. Drives content, IA, persona-aware copy and CTAs.

personas.description: Concrete personas (not segments). Keep the list short — 1 to 3 is typical, 5 is the upper bound for V1.

id.description: Stable persona id, e.g. "P-001". Referenced from goals.yaml and scope.yaml.

name.description: Short persona label, often "<First name>, <role>" (e.g. "Pavel, IT manager").

role.description: Job title or relationship (e.g. "IT manager ve výrobní firmě", "majitel kavárny").

goals.description: What this persona is trying to accomplish.

pain_points.description: Frustrations or unmet needs this persona has today.

decision_role.description: Who they are in the buying / using process.

channels.description: Where they're likely to find the site (e.g. "Google search", "LinkedIn", "doporučení").

primary_persona_id.description: Id of the persona the homepage and primary CTAs target. Must match one entry in personas[].

secondary_audiences.description: Audiences that exist but aren't the primary design target (e.g. "existing customers", "job applicants", "press").

languages.description: BCP-47 language codes the site must serve. Single entry by default; multi-entry triggers multilang in scope.yaml.
